annual_rate.notes: Post-judgment interest on money judgments not on an interest-bearing contract, under Tex. Fin. Code §304.003: the Federal Reserve prime rate with a 5% floor and 15% cap — currently 6.75% (July 2026, published by the Texas OCCC). The rate is fixed at entry for the life of the judgment and COMPOUNDS ANNUALLY (§304.006). Judgments on a contract that sets interest instead use §304.002 (lesser of the contract rate or 18%). Verify the current period at occc.texas.gov; not legal advice.

Post-judgment interest on money judgments not on an interest-bearing contract, under Tex. Fin. Code §304.003: the Federal Reserve prime rate with a 5% floor and 15% cap — currently 6.75% (July 2026, published by the Texas OCCC). The rate is fixed at entry for the life of the judgment and COMPOUNDS ANNUALLY (§304.006). Judgments on a contract that sets interest instead use §304.002 (lesser of the contract rate or 18%). Verify the current period at occc.texas.gov; not legal advice.
